status: T0 source registry; URLs and rows require verification before publication

sources.name: LMArena / Chatbot Arena
sources.intended_use: External capability and preference signals for public model comparisons.
sources.not_valid_for: Hidden architecture, parameter counts, training data, activations, or mechanistic access claims.
sources.notes: Use only as one external-observable source category.

sources.name: Artificial Analysis
sources.intended_use: External benchmark, price, speed, and context-window fields when source-verified.
sources.not_valid_for: Internal mechanistic claims or unpublished model metadata.
sources.notes: Referenced in the atlas seed for some closed frontier rows.

sources.name: OpenRouter
sources.intended_use: API availability, model naming, price/context hints subject to verification.
sources.notes: Use as secondary source unless provider docs are unavailable.

sources.name: Stanford HELM
sources.not_valid_for: Hidden architecture or mechanistic access claims.
sources.notes: Use for external capability manifold only.

sources.name: Stanford Foundation Model Transparency Index
sources.notes: FMTI-style values should be versioned and date-stamped.

sources.name: OpenAI documentation
sources.intended_use: Provider-verified access, modality, context, price, and API behavior where public.
sources.not_valid_for: Hidden architecture, hidden parameter count, hidden training data, activations, or routing.
sources.notes: Closed OpenAI rows remain external-only unless special access is documented.

sources.name: Anthropic documentation
sources.intended_use: Provider-verified access, modality, context, price, and system behavior where public.
sources.not_valid_for: Hidden architecture, hidden parameter count, hidden training data, activations, or routing.
sources.notes: Closed Anthropic rows remain external-only unless special access is documented.

sources.name: Google Gemini documentation
sources.intended_use: Provider-verified Gemini access, modalities, context, tools, and pricing where public.
sources.not_valid_for: Hidden mechanistic details for closed systems.
sources.notes: Gemini agent/system rows require decomposition from scaffold/tool behavior.

sources.name: xAI documentation
sources.intended_use: Provider-verified Grok access, context, price, and tool behavior where public.
sources.notes: Closed Grok rows remain external-only unless special access is documented.

sources.name: Perplexity documentation
sources.intended_use: Provider-verified Sonar/API search and RAG behavior where public.
sources.not_valid_for: Attributing behavior solely to the base model without scaffold/retrieval decomposition.
sources.notes: RAG/tool rows should be treated as system-level objects.

sources.name: Meta Llama documentation/model cards
sources.intended_use: Open-weight availability, license, architecture claims, modality, and context where source-verified.
sources.not_valid_for: Unverified training data or hidden deployment behavior.
sources.notes: Mechanistic feasibility remains conditional on hardware/license/tooling.

sources.name: Mistral documentation/model cards
sources.intended_use: Open/API access, license, modality, and architecture claims where source-verified.

sources.name: Qwen Hugging Face model cards
sources.intended_use: Open-weight model metadata, license, architecture, context, and tokenizer/logit feasibility where public.
sources.not_valid_for: Rows not actually tied to a verified model card.
sources.notes: SAE artifact claims need separate paper/artifact verification.

sources.name: DeepSeek Hugging Face model cards
sources.intended_use: Open-weight model metadata and architecture claims where source-verified.
sources.not_valid_for: Hardware feasibility without local resource planning.
sources.notes: Large MoE rows are likely M* if source-verified and accessible.

sources.name: Gemma Hugging Face model cards
sources.intended_use: Open-weight Gemma metadata, license terms, modalities, and context where source-verified.
sources.notes: Keep Gemma open-weight rows distinct from Gemini closed API rows.

sources.name: Microsoft Phi Hugging Face model cards
sources.intended_use: Open-weight Phi metadata, license, modality, and context where source-verified.

sources.name: EleutherAI Pythia Hugging Face model cards
sources.intended_use: Open-weight Pythia metadata, checkpoints, license, and mechanistic feasibility.
sources.not_valid_for: Current project obstruction metrics unless measured in this repo.
sources.notes: Project-measured obstruction rows for Pythia-410m and Pythia-1b are separate from source metadata.
